title: Mamoru Yonezawa the Scientific Criminal Investigation Officer
original_title: 相棒シリーズ 鑑識・米沢守の事件簿
overview: Investigator Yonezawa is searching images from the Tokyo Big City Marathon, targeted for a terrorist bomb attack. Within the images he sees his former wife Kazuko, and the following day he learns that dead body that looks like her has been discovered.
